hero.name: Pedro Kielblock
hero.title: Software Developer
hero.description: I am a passionate developer dedicated to continuous improvement and growth in my field. Each day presents a new opportunity to enhance my skills and contribute to innovative solutions.

resumeModal.title: Resume
resumeModal.prompt: Click on the desired language to download my resume.

background.title: Background
background.description: I hold a diploma in Systems Development from ETEC Lauro Gomes and a degree in Analysis and Systems Development from FATEC São Caetano do Sul - Antonio Russo. This background provides a comprehensive understanding of the technical and theoretical aspects of the field. My fluency in English is certified by B2 First, C1 Advanced and C2 Proficiency qualifications, enabling effective communication in diverse professional settings. Currently, I am leveraging these skills in my role as a Systems Analyst at ReThinkingWorks, where I engage in a range of innovative projects, applying my technical expertise and analytical skills to develop and optimize systems, keeping pace with the rapidly evolving technological landscape.

stack.title: Stack
stack.description: I specialize in Web Development, with a particular emphasis on backend technologies using Java and Spring Boot. While my primary expertise lies in this area, I maintain a flexible and expansive approach to learning.
